metadata.description: Contract- and Test-Driven Development for backend APIs and microservices — the contract and behavior tests are the executable spec.

plugins.name: ctdd
plugins.description: Drive backend changes contract-first, with tests as the executable spec: a pre-coding plan gate, changed tests reviewed as changed requirements, hold-outs on load-bearing paths, and deterministic scripts for spec-surface diffs, plan linting, and contract-derived authorization matrices.
